name: My Supernatural Power
overview: A detective in the major crimes division of Nanxing City Police Department, together with a woman who has super memory, upholds the law one case at a time in solving murders, and burglaries and bringing down a narcotics manufacturing facility.

trailers.title: 《我有特殊沟通技巧》首发预告：超能力助攻！范世錡罗予彤追凶 My Supernatural Power【芒果TV青春剧场】
